subcodes.first_line: O my God! I have turned my face to the Kingdom of Thy sanctification and the Dominion of Thy transcendent glory, with a submissive heart and broken wing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اننی یا الهی وجهت وجهی الی ملکوت تقدیسک و جبروت تنزیهک بقلب خاضع و جناح منکسر
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
